_comment: Egg Pterodactyl pour Sakura Presence Server (sakura_server.py). Import via Admin > Eggs > Import Egg.
name: Sakura Presence Server
author: sakura-launcher@example.com
description: Serveur de presence Sakura Launcher : heartbeat, online, annonces, classement, trophees.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
set -e
cd /mnt/server
echo "Installation de Sakura Presence Server..."
echo "" | base64 -d > /mnt/server/sakura_server.py
echo "sakura_server.py ecrit dans /mnt/server"
echo "Installation terminee."
